name: frontier-alpha-dashboard-v3
description: Dashboard v3 — hierarchical read + operator-grade chrome. Builds on v2 (DASH-001..006 complete). Adds a global status strip, alert queue, data-freshness signals, zone hierarchy, command palette, and keyboard shortcuts. Target: cockpit feel without losing the explainable AI read.

stories.title: Global market status strip (sticky top)
criteria: Strip is full-width, ~36px tall, sticky at top under sovereign-bar
Segments: market status (open/closed/pre/post) pill, session timer (countdown to open/close), data freshness (e.g., 'quote 2s ago'), WebSocket dot, alert count badge
Market status pill tinted by state — var(--color-positive) when open, var(--color-warning) pre/post, var(--color-text-muted) closed
WS dot: green + animate-pulse-green when connected, red static when disconnected, yellow when reconnecting
Data freshness text flips to var(--color-warning) if >15s stale, var(--color-danger) if >60s
All tokens — zero hardcoded hex
Keyboard: pressing '?' opens a tooltip listing segment meanings

stories.title: Alert queue + dropdown panel
criteria: Alert count badge in status strip, animates when new alert arrives (scale + color flash)
Click opens dropdown panel — list of last 10 alerts, grouped by severity (critical/warning/info)
Each row shows: icon, symbol (if any), short message, time ago, dismiss button
Zustand store `alertStore` with actions: push, dismiss, clearAll, markRead
Mock data from /api/v1/alerts with SWR-style revalidation every 30s
Empty state: 'No active alerts' with var(--color-positive) checkmark
A11y: role=dialog, escape to close, focus trap

stories.title: Data freshness + stale-data guard
criteria: useDataFreshness(timestamp) returns { ageSeconds, tier: 'fresh' | 'stale' | 'frozen' }
Component re-renders on 1s tick via useSyncExternalStore subscribed to a shared clock (no setInterval per-component)
Exposes window-wide event bus: onStale({source, age}) so cards can dim
Cards on Dashboard pipe through this — they opacity-60 + add 'stale' badge when frozen
Unit tests for tier boundaries (14s fresh, 16s stale, 61s frozen)

stories.title: Hierarchical zones — Primary/Secondary/Tertiary grid
criteria: Dashboard.tsx refactor — introduce three zones with distinct visual weight
Primary zone (col-span-2, 2x weight): Portfolio Overview + EquityCurve
Secondary zone (col-span-1): Position List + Weight Donut
Tertiary zone (col-span-full, collapsible): Factor Exposures + Risk Metrics + Cognitive Insight
DashZone component — renders title strip in mono/uppercase, handles collapse state, persists to localStorage
Zone titles: 'TODAY' / 'POSITIONS' / 'WHY' (one-word labels, mono tracking-[0.3em])
Responsive: zones stack on < 1024px, preserving priority order
No regressions in DASH-001..006 behavior

stories.title: Cognitive Insight v2 — factor-change surfacing
criteria: Shows top-3 factor changes in the last session: e.g., 'Momentum +8pts, Quality -3pts, Sentiment +12pts'
Each delta has sparkline trend + one-line explanation ('because NVDA revisions pulled the portfolio higher')
Tinted backdrop when net beliefs shifted >1σ from trailing 20d baseline
useFactorDeltas(portfolioId, window='1d') hook — computes deltas from ML API or mock stream
Degrades gracefully if ML endpoint 503s — shows last-known deltas with stale tint
Min-height stable so layout doesn't jump during loading

stories.title: Dashboard personalization — pinned cards + layout memory
criteria: Each card gets a 📌 pin control (icon-only, hover-reveal)
Pinned cards render first within their zone; order persisted per-user in localStorage + mirrored to Supabase when authed
Drag-to-reorder within a zone (pointer + touch), using HTML5 DnD or a minimal abstraction — no heavy library
'Reset layout' action in Settings > Dashboard
Layout store migration — versioned shape so future refactors don't nuke prefs

stories.title: Keyboard shortcuts — global G-prefix navigation
criteria: Global hotkeys using g-prefix chord: g+d dashboard, g+p portfolio, g+t trading, g+o options, g+f factors, g+a alerts
Slash '/' focuses a global ticker search input (new, in MarketStatusStrip)
Escape closes any dropdown, modal, panel
'?' opens a ShortcutLegend overlay — list of all shortcuts, theme-aware
Shortcuts disabled when focus is in input/textarea/contenteditable
No conflicts with browser shortcuts (no ctrl/cmd combos)

stories.title: Command palette (Cmd/Ctrl+K)
criteria: Cmd+K / Ctrl+K opens a centered palette with a search input + fuzzy-scored command list
Commands grouped: Navigation, Portfolio Actions, Data, Theme
Min 20 initial commands: go to every page, toggle theme, clear cache, refresh quotes, load demo, sign out, etc.
Arrow keys navigate results, Enter runs, Esc closes
Palette inherits var(--color-bg-secondary) + glass-slab, keyboard-first
Commands registered declaratively via useCommand({ id, title, group, run })
A11y: role=dialog, combobox semantics, announced on open
